name: hubberhub

scripts.install-app: osascript -e 'quit app "HubberHub"' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1 && npm run package && cp -R out/HubberHub-darwin-arm64/HubberHub.app /Applications/ && echo 'Installed to /Applications/HubberHub.app'

author: Andri Alexandrou <andri.j.alexandrou@gmail.com>
description: Smart GitHub notifications triage app with AI-powered classification
